name: Richest Spritz
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cream confectioners' sugar and butter in a large bowl with an electric mixer at medium speed.
3. Beat in egg yolks, vanilla, and almond extracts.
4. Combine flour and salt. Add to butter mixture; mix well.
5. Tint dough with food color if desired.
6. Place dough in cookie press fitted with plate.
7. Load the press with dough.
8. Press onto ungreased cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
9. Decorate as desired.
10. Bake 6-8 minutes or until very slightly browned around edges.
11. Remove to wire racks to cool.
Makes about 6 1/2 dozen cookies.
